meta.title: Footage of the DEADLIEST Gunship Ever Created
meta.description:
The most advanced helicopter ever built: Powered by twin 1,690 Horsepower engines, it can fly at 200 MPH with an effective combat range of 300 Nautical miles. It carries 16 air-to-ground rockets, 2 aim-9 air-to-air sidewinder missiles, and 750 rounds of armor-piercing incendiary rounds.

The top air combat book of 2023: https://static.macmillan.com/static/smp/art-of-clear-thinking/

Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway


📷 Produced by: Shawn Cimonetti, Michael Cunningham


SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
All platforms: @hasardlee

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

HASARD
F-35 fighter pilot, previously flew the F-16, including 82 combat missions. 

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com
